title: Rescored browser JavaScript inventory
summary: Rescored the browser JavaScript inventory with explicit maintenance, structural, performance, and architectural risk columns; converted the parent JavaScript inventory document into policy-only guidance; and added a batch-oriented implementation plan for reducing normal browser JavaScript files toward the score-4 target while keeping docs-viewer.js separate.
effect: Future JavaScript cleanup work can now be planned by route family and concrete ownership boundary instead of by stale total scores or payload size alone.
